title: USN Universal Barcode‑Ready PCR2 System for Ion Torrent
author: Sevatdal, Sofie Geck
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol describes a two-step PCR barcoding workflow developed at the University of South-Eastern Norway. PCR1 uses locus-specific primers with universal overhangs, and PCR2 introduces custom USN-designed barcodes and full Ion Torrent adapters. The method provides a flexible, modular, and contamination-aware approach for preparing sequencing-ready amplicon libraries.
steps_raw: This protocol describes a two-step PCR barcoding workflow developed at the University of South-Eastern Norway. PCR1 uses locus-specific primers with universal overhangs, and PCR2 introduces custom USN-designed barcodes and full Ion Torrent adapters. The method provides a flexible, modular, and contamination-aware approach for preparing sequencing-ready amplicon libraries.
